title: Vistra Corp. (VST) Earnings Expected to Grow: What to Know Ahead of Next Week's Release
text: Vistra Corp. (VST) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: The 7 Best Utility Stocks to Buy Now
text: The best utility stocks offer excellent defensive plays in riding out today's volatile markets. The demand for utility services remains relatively insulated from broad market downturns.

title: Vistra to Report Second Quarter 2022 Results on August 5, 2022
text: IRVING, Texas , July 18, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Vistra (NYSE: VST) plans to report its second quarter 2022 financial and operating results on Friday, Aug. 5, 2022.  Management will present the materials during a live conference call and webcast beginning at 8 a.m.
